task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the first mixed pallet (Package) matching the Pallet Alpha manifest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Package details screen or stock list showing a specific package containing exactly: 200 units of 'Med-Syringe 10ml', 100 units of 'Med-Saline 500ml', and 400 units of 'Med-Bandage Roll'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the second mixed pallet (Package) matching the Pallet Beta manifest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Package details screen or stock list showing a specific package containing exactly: 300 units of 'Med-Syringe 10ml', 100 units of 'Med-Saline 500ml', and 600 units of 'Med-Bandage Roll'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the third mixed pallet (Package) matching the Pallet Gamma manifest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Package details screen or stock list showing a specific package containing exactly: 800 units of 'Med-Gauze Pads 4x4', 600 units of 'Med-Surgical Gloves Size M', and 600 units of 'Med-Surgical Gloves Size L'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the created packages are located in the 'WH/Stock/Rapid Deployment' zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Location field on the Package details screens or the Inventory -> Locations view for 'WH/Stock/Rapid Deployment'. The three created packages must be listed under this specific location.

task_completion.description: Verify that no loose stock remains in the Rapid Deployment location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Current Stock view filtered by Location 'WH/Stock/Rapid Deployment'. Every line item shown must have a value in the 'Package' column. There should be no items listed without an assigned package.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Odoo web interface to perform the inventory consolidation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Odoo Inventory module (Operations, Transfers, Packages, or Locations) in a web browser, rather than using terminal scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent must not directly modify the database to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'psql' or python scripts executing SQL queries or XML-RPC calls to update stock quantities or package assignments.

integrity.description: The results must be visible within the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The package contents and locations must be shown in the standard Odoo interface (e.g., list views, form views), not typed out in a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pallet Alpha requires exactly: 200 Med-Syringe 10ml, 100 Med-Saline 500ml, 400 Med-Bandage Roll. Pallet Beta requires exactly: 300 Med-Syringe 10ml, 100 Med-Saline 500ml, 600 Med-Bandage Roll. Pallet Gamma requires exactly: 800 Med-Gauze Pads 4x4, 600 Med-Surgical Gloves Size M, 600 Med-Surgical Gloves Size L. The pass threshold for the task is 85.
